mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource (title, file_path, file_name, user_id, username) VALUES (#{title}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{userId}, #{username})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, file_path, file_name, user_id, username FROM resource ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, file_path, file_name, user_id, username FROM resource WHERE id = #{id}
